  "concepts": [
    {"id": "c1", "name": "Artificial intelligence", "aliases": ["AI"], "description": "AI as a technology reshaping how government functions, across public service delivery and back-end systems.", "grounding_span": "Artificial Intelligence is on the path to reshape how government functions, from the administration of public services to the back-end systems that keep government running.", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"id": "c2", "name": "Generative AI", "aliases": ["GenAI"], "description": "AI focus of the assessment; adoption, use, and value of generative AI in state government.", "grounding_span": "this assessment focuses most on generative AI adoption, use, and value", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"id": "c3", "name": "Predictive AI", "aliases": [], "description": "Earlier class of AI implementations tracked as background signal.", "grounding_span": "previous implementations of predictive AI and intelligent automation", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"id": "c4", "name": "Intelligent automation", "aliases": [], "description": "Prior automation implementations tracked alongside predictive AI.", "grounding_span": "previous implementations of predictive AI and intelligent automation", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"id": "c5", "name": "Agentic AI", "aliases": [], "description": "Emerging AI category expected to shift readiness baselines.", "grounding_span": "new work in agentic AI", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"id": "c6", "name": "AI adoption as an institutional journey", "aliases": [], "description": "Framing of AI adoption as a multi-agency institutional journey rather than a single procurement or upgrade.", "grounding_span": "It’s an institutional journey across agencies and departments.", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"id": "c7", "name": "Readiness", "aliases": ["Foundational readiness"], "description": "First maturity stage: building the institutional foundation for responsible AI.", "grounding_span": "**Readiness** builds the foundation", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"id": "c8", "name": "Piloting", "aliases": [], "description": "Second maturity stage: structured experimentation and pilots.", "grounding_span": "**Piloting** demonstrates what’s possible", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"id": "c9", "name": "Implementation", "aliases": [], "description": "Third maturity stage: AI embedded operationally in government systems.", "grounding_span": "**Implementation** delivers results", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"id": "c10", "name": "Impact", "aliases": [], "description": "Fourth maturity stage: accountability, measurement, and continuous improvement.", "grounding_span": "**Impact** ensures accountability and improvement", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"id": "c11", "name": "Leadership", "aliases": [], "description": "Readiness pillar: organizational structure and leadership dedicated to AI initiatives.", "grounding_span": "_Leadership_ evaluates the organizational structure and leadership dedicated to AI initiatives within state government", "location": "Stages of the journey > Readiness"},
    {"id": "c12", "name": "Capacity", "aliases": [], "description": "Readiness pillar: investments in AI literacy, skills, and expertise across the workforce.", "grounding_span": "_Capacity_ evaluates the state's investments in developing AI literacy, skills, and expertise across its workforce", "location": "Stages of the journey > Readiness"},
    {"id": "c13", "name": "Infrastructure", "aliases": [], "description": "Readiness pillar: technical foundation including data, compute, platforms, and vendor partnerships.", "grounding_span": "_Infrastructure_ evaluates the technical foundation—things like data accessibility, computing resources and platforms, and partnerships with technical vendors and service providers", "location": "Stages of the journey > Readiness"},
    {"id": "c14", "name": "AI literacy", "aliases": [], "description": "Workforce AI skills and expertise developed as part of capacity building.", "grounding_span": "developing AI literacy, skills, and expertise across its workforce", "location": "Stages of the journey > Readiness"},
    {"id": "c15", "name": "AI innovation lab", "aliases": [], "description": "Dedicated lab within agencies or statewide for AI experimentation.", "grounding_span": "AI innovation labs within agencies or state-wide", "location": "Stages of the journey > Piloting"},
    {"id": "c16", "name": "AI sandbox", "aliases": [], "description": "Controlled environment for safely testing AI use cases.", "grounding_span": "AI sandboxes for testing safely", "location": "Stages of the journey > Piloting"},
    {"id": "c17", "name": "Pilot project", "aliases": [], "description": "Structured limited AI deployment for evaluation.", "grounding_span": "Pilot projects", "location": "Stages of the journey > Piloting"},
    {"id": "c18", "name": "Guardrails", "aliases": [], "description": "Constraints and timeframes governing limited AI deployments.", "grounding_span": "Limited deployments with clear guardrails and timeframes for evaluation", "location": "Stages of the journey > Piloting"},
    {"id": "c19", "name": "Responsible AI principles", "aliases": [], "description": "Principles emphasized during the readiness stage.", "grounding_span": "States have focused heavily on responsible AI principles, ethical frameworks, transparency considerations, and risk mitigation.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Readiness"},
    {"id": "c20", "name": "Ethical frameworks", "aliases": [], "description": "Ethics guidance emphasized in readiness.", "grounding_span": "States have focused heavily on responsible AI principles, ethical frameworks, transparency considerations, and risk mitigation.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Readiness"},
    {"id": "c21", "name": "Transparency", "aliases": [], "description": "Transparency considerations in AI governance.", "grounding_span": "States have focused heavily on responsible AI principles, ethical frameworks, transparency considerations, and risk mitigation.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Readiness"},
    {"id": "c22", "name": "Risk mitigation", "aliases": [], "description": "Mitigation of AI-related risks emphasized in readiness.", "grounding_span": "States have focused heavily on responsible AI principles, ethical frameworks, transparency considerations, and risk mitigation.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Readiness"},
    {"id": "c23", "name": "AI governance bodies", "aliases": ["governance frameworks", "governance structures"], "description": "Dedicated bodies and frameworks governing state AI use.", "grounding_span": "States with strong executive leadership and dedicated AI governance bodies move faster.", "location": "Trends & highlights"},
    {"id": "c24", "name": "Chief AI officer", "aliases": ["chief data and AI officer"], "description": "Executive leadership role dedicated to AI within state government.", "grounding_span": "New York also has a chief AI officer leadership position", "location": "Trends & highlights > Readiness"},
    {"id": "c25", "name": "Model monitoring", "aliases": ["ongoing model monitoring"], "description": "Continuous oversight of deployed AI models.", "grounding_span": "ongoing model monitoring, bias mitigation, cybersecurity concerns, and change management", "location": "Stages of the journey > Implementation"},
    {"id": "c26", "name": "Bias mitigation", "aliases": [], "description": "Reducing bias in operational AI systems.", "grounding_span": "ongoing model monitoring, bias mitigation, cybersecurity concerns, and change management", "location": "Stages of the journey > Implementation"},
    {"id": "c27", "name": "Change management", "aliases": [], "description": "Managing organizational change during AI operationalization.", "grounding_span": "ongoing model monitoring, bias mitigation, cybersecurity concerns, and change management", "location": "Stages of the journey > Implementation"},
    {"id": "c28", "name": "AI-assisted case management", "aliases": [], "description": "Operational AI use case supporting case management.", "grounding_span": "AI-assisted case management", "location": "Stages of the journey > Implementation"},
    {"id": "c29", "name": "Public-facing chat assistant", "aliases": ["chatbot", "virtual assistant"], "description": "Citizen-facing conversational AI assistant.", "grounding_span": "Public-facing chat assistants", "location": "Stages of the journey > Implementation"},
    {"id": "c30", "name": "Fraud detection", "aliases": [], "description": "AI models to detect fraudulent claims or patterns.", "grounding_span": "Fraud detection models", "location": "Stages of the journey > Implementation"},
    {"id": "c31", "name": "Intelligent Document Processing", "aliases": ["document automation"], "description": "AI service that screens uploaded documents for quality and relevance.", "grounding_span": "Pennsylvania pioneered an Intelligent Document Processing service", "location": "Trends & highlights > Implementation"},
    {"id": "c32", "name": "Benefits navigation and eligibility guidance", "aliases": [], "description": "Generative AI agent helping residents navigate benefit programs and eligibility.", "grounding_span": "a generative AI-powered benefits navigation and eligibility guidance agent", "location": "Trends & highlights > Implementation"},
    {"id": "c33", "name": "Automated Decision Systems Inventory", "aliases": ["AI system registry", "automated decision system inventories"], "description": "Recurring inventory creating visibility into where AI is used.", "grounding_span": "recurring automated decision system inventories or AI system registries", "location": "Trends & highlights > Impact"},
    {"id": "c34", "name": "Feedback loops", "aliases": ["continuous learning"], "description": "Embedded loops informing procurement, design, and policy adjustments.", "grounding_span": "Feedback loops are embedded", "location": "Stages of the journey > Impact"},
    {"id": "c35", "name": "Efficiency gains", "aliases": [], "description": "Efficiency improvements measured as an AI outcome.", "grounding_span": "ongoing evaluation of efficiency gains, cost savings, service quality improvements, and public trust", "location": "Stages of the journey > Impact"},
    {"id": "c36", "name": "Public value", "aliases": ["public trust"], "description": "Public value and trust as outcomes AI should be measured against.", "grounding_span": "Even leading states are still developing systematic methods to measure public value from AI.", "location": "Trends & highlights"},
    {"id": "c37", "name": "Workforce readiness", "aliases": ["workforce training"], "description": "Training public employees in AI tools as a driver of adoption.", "grounding_span": "Training public employees in AI tools is a major driver of adoption.", "location": "Trends & highlights"},
    {"id": "c38", "name": "Enterprise data platform", "aliases": ["consolidated data platform"], "description": "Statewide data platform enabling faster progression to operational AI.", "grounding_span": "States with enterprise data platforms progress more quickly to operational AI.", "location": "Trends & highlights"},
    {"id": "c39", "name": "Benefits access lens", "aliases": [], "description": "Analytical lens added to the assessment focused on benefits delivery.", "grounding_span": "This report also evolved to include a benefits access lens.", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"id": "c40", "name": "Measurement of AI public value", "aliases": ["evaluation frameworks"], "description": "Systematic methods to measure public value and outcomes from AI.", "grounding_span": "Even leading states are still developing systematic methods to measure public value from AI.", "location": "Trends & highlights"},
    {"id": "c41", "name": "Procurement", "aliases": ["procurement bottlenecks"], "description": "Procurement processes and bottlenecks affecting AI adoption.", "grounding_span": "procurement bottlenecks due to lack of established criteria or subject matter expertise", "location": "Stages of the journey > Piloting"},
    {"id": "c42", "name": "Data accessibility", "aliases": [], "description": "Accessibility of data as an infrastructure component.", "grounding_span": "things like data accessibility, computing resources and platforms", "location": "Stages of the journey > Readiness"},
    {"id": "c43", "name": "Computing resources", "aliases": [], "description": "Compute resources and platforms as infrastructure.", "grounding_span": "things like data accessibility, computing resources and platforms", "location": "Stages of the journey > Readiness"}
  ],
  "definitions": [
    {"id": "d1", "term": "Leadership", "verbatim_text": "_Leadership_ evaluates the organizational structure and leadership dedicated to AI initiatives within state government", "normative_status": "industry", "as_of_date": "2026-05", "grounding_span": "_Leadership_ evaluates the organizational structure and leadership dedicated to AI initiatives within state government", "location": "Stages of the journey > Readiness"},
    {"id": "d2", "term": "Capacity", "verbatim_text": "_Capacity_ evaluates the state's investments in developing AI literacy, skills, and expertise across its workforce", "normative_status": "industry", "as_of_date": "2026-05", "grounding_span": "_Capacity_ evaluates the state's investments in developing AI literacy, skills, and expertise across its workforce", "location": "Stages of the journey > Readiness"},
    {"id": "d3", "term": "Infrastructure", "verbatim_text": "_Infrastructure_ evaluates the technical foundation—things like data accessibility, computing resources and platforms, and partnerships with technical vendors and service providers", "normative_status": "industry", "as_of_date": "2026-05", "grounding_span": "_Infrastructure_ evaluates the technical foundation—things like data accessibility, computing resources and platforms, and partnerships with technical vendors and service providers", "location": "Stages of the journey > Readiness"},
    {"id": "d4", "term": "Early", "verbatim_text": "Initial steps with only basic foundational elements emerging", "normative_status": "industry", "as_of_date": "2026-05", "grounding_span": "Initial steps with only basic foundational elements emerging", "location": "Assessment levels"},
    {"id": "d5", "term": "Developing", "verbatim_text": "Core components in place with growing capabilities and some formalization", "normative_status": "industry", "as_of_date": "2026-05", "grounding_span": "Core components in place with growing capabilities and some formalization", "location": "Assessment levels"},
    {"id": "d6", "term": "Established", "verbatim_text": "Mature implementations with systematic approaches and demonstrated effectiveness", "normative_status": "industry", "as_of_date": "2026-05", "grounding_span": "Mature implementations with systematic approaches and demonstrated effectiveness", "location": "Assessment levels"},
    {"id": "d7", "term": "Advanced", "verbatim_text": "Sophisticated, comprehensive frameworks and innovative, state-of-the-art approaches", "normative_status": "industry", "as_of_date": "2026-05", "grounding_span": "Sophisticated, comprehensive frameworks and innovative, state-of-the-art approaches", "location": "Assessment levels"},
    {"id": "d8", "term": "Readiness", "verbatim_text": "**Readiness** builds the foundation", "normative_status": "industry", "as_of_date": "2026-05", "grounding_span": "**Readiness** builds the foundation", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"id": "d9", "term": "Piloting", "verbatim_text": "**Piloting** demonstrates what’s possible", "normative_status": "industry", "as_of_date": "2026-05", "grounding_span": "**Piloting** demonstrates what’s possible", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"id": "d10", "term": "Implementation", "verbatim_text": "**Implementation** delivers results", "normative_status": "industry", "as_of_date": "2026-05", "grounding_span": "**Implementation** delivers results", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"id": "d11", "term": "Impact", "verbatim_text": "**Impact** ensures accountability and improvement", "normative_status": "industry", "as_of_date": "2026-05", "grounding_span": "**Impact** ensures accountability and improvement", "location": "Introduction"}
  ],
  "claims": [
    {"id": "cl1", "claim_text": "Most states are still early in this journey.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "Most states are still early in this journey.", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"id": "cl2", "claim_text": "Each stage builds upon the previous one.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Each stage builds upon the previous one.", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"id": "cl3", "claim_text": "States with strong executive leadership and dedicated AI governance bodies move faster.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "States with strong executive leadership and dedicated AI governance bodies move faster.", "location": "Trends & highlights"},
    {"id": "cl4", "claim_text": "States with enterprise data platforms progress more quickly to operational AI.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "States with enterprise data platforms progress more quickly to operational AI.", "location": "Trends & highlights"},
    {"id": "cl5", "claim_text": "Formal AI sandboxes and pilot programs generate better evidence.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "Formal AI sandboxes and pilot programs generate better evidence.", "location": "Trends & highlights"},
    {"id": "cl6", "claim_text": "Training public employees in AI tools is a major driver of adoption.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "Training public employees in AI tools is a major driver of adoption.", "location": "Trends & highlights"},
    {"id": "cl7", "claim_text": "For government, there is more at stake in responsibly moving from piloting to implementation than there is for industry.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "For government, there’s more at stake in responsibly moving from piloting to implementation than there is for industry.", "location": "Trends & highlights"},
    {"id": "cl8", "claim_text": "Even leading states are still developing systematic methods to measure public value from AI.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "Even leading states are still developing systematic methods to measure public value from AI.", "location": "Trends & highlights"},
    {"id": "cl9", "claim_text": "Over the past two years, nearly every state has entered this foundational stage in some capacity.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "Over the past two years, nearly every state has entered this foundational stage in some capacity.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Readiness"},
    {"id": "cl10", "claim_text": "Nearly every state has engaged in some form of AI pilot.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "Nearly every state has engaged in some form of AI pilot, and many states started by experimenting with internal productivity tools.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Piloting"},
    {"id": "cl11", "claim_text": "Most states are now somewhere within this operational transition, with many prioritizing efficiency gains over full service redesign.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "Most states are now somewhere within this operational transition, with many prioritizing efficiency gains over full service redesign.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Implementation"},
    {"id": "cl12", "claim_text": "The majority of states are still focused on defining guardrails rather than building longitudinal evaluation mechanisms.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "The majority of states are still focused on defining guardrails rather than building longitudinal evaluation mechanisms.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Impact"},
    {"id": "cl13", "claim_text": "There is very limited reporting on the impact of AI, and a truly continuous learning infrastructure remains concentrated in a small group of states.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "There is very limited reporting on the impact of AI, and a truly continuous learning infrastructure remains concentrated in a small group of states.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Impact"},
    {"id": "cl14", "claim_text": "Pennsylvania's Intelligent Document Processing decreased instances of illegible or incorrect documents by 80 percent and saved County Assistance Offices staff more than 700 hours of work.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "decreasing instances of illegible or incorrect documents by 80 percent and saving County Assistance Offices staff more than 700 hours of work.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Implementation"},
    {"id": "cl15", "claim_text": "States with consolidated data platforms, cloud-first strategies, centralized IT governance, and strong data interoperability have progressed more quickly into Established or Advanced operational maturity.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "States with consolidated data platforms, cloud-first strategies, centralized IT governance, and strong data interoperability have progressed more quickly into Established or Advanced operational maturity.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Implementation"},
    {"id": "cl16", "claim_text": "As states implement agentic AI tools, the baselines for readiness could shift dramatically.", "claim_type": "speculative", "grounding_span": "the **baselines for readiness could shift dramatically**", "location": "The Road Ahead"}
  ],
  "instruments": [
    {"id": "i1", "name": "Government AI Landscape Assessment", "owner": "Code for America", "year": 2026, "method": "Extensive desk research using publicly available materials with feedback loops from states and AI leaders", "grounding_span": "To develop a comprehensive view of state-level AI readiness and use, we conducted extensive desk research using publicly available materials with feedback loops from states and AI leaders.", "location": "Methodology"}
  ],
  "measures": [
    {"id": "m1", "text": "Each stage of the journey is assessed using a four-level maturity rubric: Early, Developing, Established, Advanced.", "response_type": "ordinal maturity scale (Early, Developing, Established, Advanced)", "grounding_span": "Each stage of the journey is assessed using the following rubric.", "location": "Assessment levels"}
  ],

    {"id": "f1", "name": "AI adoption journey (four-stage progression)", "owner": "Code for America", "year": 2026, "grounding_span": "The AI journey can be understood as a progression across four stages:", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"id": "f2", "name": "Foundational readiness pillars", "owner": "Code for America", "year": 2026, "grounding_span": "Foundational readiness focuses on three core pillars:", "location": "Stages of the journey > Readiness"}

    {"type": "mentions", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "c39", "grounding_span": "This report also evolved to include a benefits access lens.", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "d1", "grounding_span": "_Leadership_ evaluates the organizational structure and leadership dedicated to AI initiatives within state government", "location": "Stages of the journey > Readiness"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "d2", "grounding_span": "_Capacity_ evaluates the state's investments in developing AI literacy, skills, and expertise across its workforce", "location": "Stages of the journey > Readiness"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "d3", "grounding_span": "_Infrastructure_ evaluates the technical foundation—things like data accessibility, computing resources and platforms, and partnerships with technical vendors and service providers", "location": "Stages of the journey > Readiness"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "d4", "grounding_span": "Initial steps with only basic foundational elements emerging", "location": "Assessment levels"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "d5", "grounding_span": "Core components in place with growing capabilities and some formalization", "location": "Assessment levels"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "d6", "grounding_span": "Mature implementations with systematic approaches and demonstrated effectiveness", "location": "Assessment levels"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "d7", "grounding_span": "Sophisticated, comprehensive frameworks and innovative, state-of-the-art approaches", "location": "Assessment levels"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "d8", "grounding_span": "**Readiness** builds the foundation", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "d9", "grounding_span": "**Piloting** demonstrates what’s possible", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "d10", "grounding_span": "**Implementation** delivers results", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "d11", "grounding_span": "**Impact** ensures accountability and improvement", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "cl1", "grounding_span": "Most states are still early in this journey.", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "cl2", "grounding_span": "Each stage builds upon the previous one.", "location": "Introduction"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "cl3", "grounding_span": "States with strong executive leadership and dedicated AI governance bodies move faster.", "location": "Trends & highlights"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "cl4", "grounding_span": "States with enterprise data platforms progress more quickly to operational AI.", "location": "Trends & highlights"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "cl5", "grounding_span": "Formal AI sandboxes and pilot programs generate better evidence.", "location": "Trends & highlights"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "cl6", "grounding_span": "Training public employees in AI tools is a major driver of adoption.", "location": "Trends & highlights"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "cl7", "grounding_span": "For government, there’s more at stake in responsibly moving from piloting to implementation than there is for industry.", "location": "Trends & highlights"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "cl8", "grounding_span": "Even leading states are still developing systematic methods to measure public value from AI.", "location": "Trends & highlights"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "cl9", "grounding_span": "Over the past two years, nearly every state has entered this foundational stage in some capacity.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Readiness"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "cl10", "grounding_span": "Nearly every state has engaged in some form of AI pilot, and many states started by experimenting with internal productivity tools.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Piloting"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "cl11", "grounding_span": "Most states are now somewhere within this operational transition, with many prioritizing efficiency gains over full service redesign.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Implementation"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "cl12", "grounding_span": "The majority of states are still focused on defining guardrails rather than building longitudinal evaluation mechanisms.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Impact"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "cl13", "grounding_span": "There is very limited reporting on the impact of AI, and a truly continuous learning infrastructure remains concentrated in a small group of states.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Impact"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "cl14", "grounding_span": "decreasing instances of illegible or incorrect documents by 80 percent and saving County Assistance Offices staff more than 700 hours of work.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Implementation"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "cl15", "grounding_span": "States with consolidated data platforms, cloud-first strategies, centralized IT governance, and strong data interoperability have progressed more quickly into Established or Advanced operational maturity.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Implementation"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "government-ai-landscape-assessment-code-for-america", "to_id": "cl16", "grounding_span": "the **baselines for readiness could shift dramatically**", "location": "The Road Ahead"},

  "proposed_relationships": [
    {"suggested_edge": "jurisdiction_operates_program", "from_description": "Georgia (state)", "to_description": "AI Innovation Lab (controlled sandbox with pre-vetted vendors)", "grounding_span": "Georgia invested in the infrastructure to enable AI, standing up a digital and physical AI Innovation Lab, a controlled sandbox environment where a roster of pre-vetted vendors can work directly with state agencies to conceive and deliver AI pilot projects.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Readiness"},
    {"suggested_edge": "jurisdiction_operates_program", "from_description": "New York (state)", "to_description": "Empire AI initiative", "grounding_span": "New York also has a chief AI officer leadership position and launched the Empire AI initiative, which focuses on employee upskilling and building out infrastructure for AI testing and deployment.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Readiness"},
    {"suggested_edge": "jurisdiction_operates_program", "from_description": "North Carolina (state)", "to_description": "Government Data Analytics Center (GDAC)", "grounding_span": "North Carolina’s Government Data Analytics Center (GDAC) had already piloted traditional AI and machine learning before the generative AI wave.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Piloting"},
    {"suggested_edge": "jurisdiction_operates_program", "from_description": "Connecticut (state)", "to_description": "AI Enablement Lab", "grounding_span": "Connecticut established an internal AI Enablement Lab within its IT division, providing a space for agencies to safely pilot AI use cases with privacy protections.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Piloting"},
    {"suggested_edge": "jurisdiction_deploys_system_with_vendor", "from_description": "Maryland (state), with Anthropic", "to_description": "generative AI-powered benefits navigation and eligibility guidance agent", "grounding_span": "Maryland partnered with AI providers, including Anthropic, to deploy a generative AI-powered benefits navigation and eligibility guidance agent to help residents navigate programs such as food assistance, Medicaid, and housing support.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Implementation"},
    {"suggested_edge": "jurisdiction_deploys_system", "from_description": "Pennsylvania (state)", "to_description": "Intelligent Document Processing service on the COMPASS benefits application system", "grounding_span": "Pennsylvania pioneered an Intelligent Document Processing service—where documents are scanned for legibility when users upload required documentation to the COMPASS benefits application system—to verify information in their application or renewal.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Implementation"},
    {"suggested_edge": "jurisdiction_deploys_system", "from_description": "Vermont (state)", "to_description": "ChatVT virtual assistant", "grounding_span": "Vermont implemented a virtual assistant called ChatVT on its state portal to handle common questions about state programs.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Impact"},
    {"suggested_edge": "jurisdiction_establishes_office", "from_description": "Utah (state)", "to_description": "Office of Artificial Intelligence Policy (OAIP) and AI Learning Lab", "grounding_span": "Utah launched the nation’s first Office of Artificial Intelligence Policy (OAIP) and its AI Learning Lab program, explicitly designed to let AI innovations be piloted under close state oversight.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Impact"},
    {"suggested_edge": "jurisdiction_approves_pilot", "from_description": "Utah OAIP", "to_description": "Doctronic AI prescription-renewal pilot", "grounding_span": "In 2025, Utah approved a pilot with a local startup (Doctronic) to use an AI system for autonomously renewing routine prescriptions for chronic conditions.", "location": "Trends & highlights > Impact"},
    {"suggested_edge": "authored_by", "from_description": "Government AI Landscape Assessment", "to_description": "Stephen Rockwell (research and analysis lead)", "grounding_span": "We are especially grateful to Stephen Rockwell for leading our research and analysis efforts.", "location": "Acknowledgements"}
  ]
}
